intents.name: Honesty gate
intents.summary: No finding may claim more than its evidence supports; absence must be proven and severity is capped by evidence strength.

intents.name: Cap severity by evidence strength
intents.summary: unverifiable evidence caps at P2; inferred without a 2nd verified fact caps at P1

intentMeta.invariant: unverifiable evidence caps at P2; inferred without a 2nd verified fact caps at P1

intents.name: Prove absence before claiming missing
intents.summary: only `absent` (full coverage, residues ruled out) may assert true absence

intentMeta.invariant: only `absent` (full coverage, residues ruled out) may assert true absence

intents.name: Coverage manifest
intents.summary: Every assessable node carries an explicit coverage status; nothing is silently skipped.

intents.name: Account for every assessable node
intents.summary: byStatus tallies must equal the number of assessable nodes

intentMeta.invariant: byStatus tallies must equal the number of assessable nodes

intents.name: Reconcile prior verdicts across reformat-only changes
intents.summary: a reformat (same normalized fingerprint) must reuse the prior verdict, not re-judge

intentMeta.invariant: a reformat (same normalized fingerprint) must reuse the prior verdict, not re-judge

nodes.name: reconcilePriorRun
nodes.summary: Expected by confirmed intent, not found in the index
